meaning: n.拇指vt.以拇指拨弄,笨拙处理,弄坏,翻阅,作搭车手势vi.用拇指翻书页
examples: There's a hole in the thumb.
He caught his thumb in the door.
She still sucks her thumb when she's worried.
That way you can keep key customers under thumb while also getting valuable feedback on your business.
Kevin Mitnicks crime was to thumb his nose at the costly computer security systems employed by large corporations.
